productName: Honey Stixx - 2Pk - Crystal - Peach Crescendo X Strawberry Banana
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Peach Crescendo X Strawberry Banana flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of strawberry, tree fruit, and tropical, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
